summary: Subscription enforcement, TWS disconnect detection, custom sign-out popover, connection reliability.
release_notes: Fixed critical bug where removing all Cognito groups from a user granted full access instead of locking them out.
Users with no active subscription are now blocked at login with a clear error message.
Added plan expiry support — a custom:plan_expiry attribute on the Cognito user controls when the subscription ends.
Expired subscriptions are enforced on login, token refresh, and periodically during the session.
Server-side subscription validation on both /auth/verify and /auth/refresh — blocks login and token refresh with a 403 if no groups or plan expired.
Plan downgrade toasts — if trading or analytics access is removed mid-session, a warning toast notifies the user.
Heartbeat interval reduced from 50 minutes to 15 minutes for faster detection of plan changes.
Heartbeat is non-blocking — token refresh runs in the background without freezing the UI.
Analytics page now re-checks access every 15 minutes and redirects to the main page if the subscription was revoked.
Analytics page no longer grants access to users with empty groups.
OTP sender email falls back to AdminEmail parameter when no custom domain is configured.
Login errors (user not found, account not activated) now show a toast notification in addition to the inline message.
Custom sign-out popover replaces the browser confirm dialog — shows email and a styled sign-out button.
TWS disconnect is now detected during polling — shows the disconnected overlay and auto-reconnects when TWS comes back.
Disconnected overlay no longer covers the top bar — settings button remains clickable.
Removed the 3-minute reconnect timeout — app now waits indefinitely for TWS to connect.
